---

## How It Works

1. **Ingest** — Bots pull from GitHub, npm, PyPI, HN, Reddit, Anthropic Registry every 6h
2. **Classify** — Claude AI assigns category, kind, tags, compatibility
3. **Publish** — README and site rebuild automatically
